name: ruflo-local
description: Local-first tiered LLM routing kit — learned-routing overlay (scripts/lib/*.mjs)
comment: Zero-runtime-config kit; the only deps are OPTIONAL packages, all loaded via dynamic import with graceful fallback. @ruvector/rvf — a real .rvf routing corpus (JSONL fallback when absent). @ruvector/ruvllm — the IN-PROCESS prompt embedder (no CLI/argv, so a private prompt never hits the process table). @metaharness/router (phase 10) — the cost-optimal k-NN model router, evaluated OFFLINE head-to-head vs ruflo's router in scripts/lib/metaharness-eval.mjs (never a second live learner). Tests use Node's built-in runner (node --test), no test framework.
